allow: PowerShell(sqlcmd -S localhost -E -d galeria_arte -Q "SELECT id, filename, title, artist, category FROM Images" -W)

PowerShell(sqlcmd -S localhost -E -d galeria_arte -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT filename, title, description, artist, category, filepath, fileSize, mimetype, CONVERT\(varchar, uploadDate, 126\) as uploadDate FROM Images" -W -s "|")
PowerShell(git --version; try { \(Get-Command gh -ErrorAction Stop\).Source; gh auth status 2>&1 } catch { "gh CLI no instalado" })

PowerShell(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://galeria-arte-production-55ca.up.railway.app/api/health" -Method Get | ConvertTo-Json; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://galeria-arte-production-55ca.up.railway.app/api/images" -Method Get | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 } catch { "Error /api/images: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://galeria-arte-production-55ca.up.railway.app/1784366518055-860892447.jpg" -Method Head -UseBasicParsing; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\) | Tipo: $\($r.Headers['Content-Type']\) | Tamaño: $\($r.Headers['Content-Length']\) bytes")

PowerShell($login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login" -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"username":"artista","password":"cambiame123"}'; $headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $\($login.token\)" }; \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/images/1784367750760-127870965.jpg" -Method Put -ContentType "application/json" -Headers $headers -Body '{"title":"Soledad en Blanco y Negro"}'\).message)

PowerShell($login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login" -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"username":"artista","password":"cambiame123"}'; $headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $\($login.token\)" }; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/images/1784366518055-860892447.jpg" -Method Put -ContentType "application/json" -Headers $headers -Body '{"uploadDate":"2025-03-15"}'; "Fecha guardada: $\($r.image.uploadDate\)")
